business_name.title: Business Name
business_name.description: Name of the business to analyse.

location.title: Location
location.description: City and country, e.g. 'New York, USA'.

limit_per_platform.title: Reviews Limit Per Platform
limit_per_platform.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape from each platform (1–500).

get_as_file.title: Send Results as File
get_as_file.description: Generate a file (CSV / XLSX / JSON) and send it to your email or Discord.
get_as_file.sectionDescription: Optional. Results are always available in the dataset. Enable this to receive a file by email or Discord DM.

export_format.title: File Format
export_format.description: Format of the file sent when 'Send Results as File' is enabled.

destination_platform.title: Destination
destination_platform.description: Where to send the file — email attachment or Discord DM.

destination_address.title: Email or Discord Username
destination_address.description: Email address for delivery, or Discord username for DM. For Discord, you must join the Pingrole server first: https://discord.gg/p5aCRvkHWE
